summary: Iteration 21: Tested Immobilier Refonte (P1 features) - All 24 backend tests passed, all frontend pages working correctly. Features tested: enriched property data (price_converted, property_category, bedrooms, bathrooms, surface_area), map with clustered markers, neighborhoods endpoint, heatmap data, price estimation with currency conversion, saved properties (favorites), search alerts, and agent profiles.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <option>/<select> - caused by dev tooling injection, does not affect production functionality

backend_api: GET /api/properties - Returns enriched data with price_converted, property_category, bedrooms, bathrooms, surface_area
GET /api/properties/map/markers - Returns markers with lat/lng and supports filters
GET /api/properties/estimate without city - Returns 422 validation error
POST /api/search-alerts - Creates alert with city, neighborhood, type, price range, property_category, min_bedrooms
GET /api/agents/{id}/profile - Returns agent info with stats (total_properties, available_properties, total_views)
GET /api/agents/{id}/properties - Returns agent's available properties with enriched data
frontend_ui: ImmobilierPage loads with property cards showing price, title, location, property_category, bedrooms, surface_area
ImmobilierPage action buttons: Carte, Favoris (auth), Estimation, Alertes (auth)
PropertyFilters component has neighborhood, property_category, bedrooms filters
MapPage loads with Leaflet map and MarkerClusterGroup
MapPage has filter panel with type, city, neighborhood, status, price filters
PriceEstimatePage loads with form (city, quartier, type_de_bien, chambres, surface)
PriceEstimatePage shows estimation result with price_converted (~$12 / 11 EUR)
AgentProfilePage shows agent name, role, stats (annonces, disponibles, vues totales)
FavoritesPage shows saved properties list (requires auth)
SearchAlertsPage shows alerts list and create alert form (requires auth)
PropertyDetailPage shows title, price, save button, agent profile link
PropertyDetailPage shows verified badge, category, bedrooms, bathrooms, surface_area when available

critical_code_review_comments: PropertyCard.js exports formatPrice and formatPriceConverted functions that are properly imported by other components (MapPage, FavoritesPage, PriceEstimatePage, PropertyDetailPage)
Price conversion only applies to GNF currency properties - the existing test property is in USD so price_converted won't show USD/EUR equivalent
All new endpoints follow proper auth patterns - saved-properties and search-alerts require get_current_user
Agent profile lookup correctly filters by role in ('agent', 'admin') with stats aggregation
Search alerts max limit of 10 per user is enforced with proper error message
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed search alerts created during pytest run and cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 validated all P1 Immobilier Refonte features. The test property in DB is in USD currency (100,000 USD) so price_converted will not show USD/EUR equivalents (conversion only applies to GNF). PropertyCard exports formatPrice/formatPriceConverted functions used by multiple components. Agent profiles require role='agent' or 'admin'. Search alerts have max 10 per user limit. All authenticated endpoints return 403 (not 401) when auth header missing.
